datasets.name: rivalries_ai
queryLines:
SELECT
  team_1,
  team_2,
  total_meetings,
  team_1_wins,
  team_2_wins,
  draws,
  ai_query(
    'databricks-meta-llama-3-3-70b-instruct',
    CONCAT(
      'In one sentence, summarize this FIFA World Cup rivalry: ',
      team_1,
      ' vs ',
      team_2,
      '. ',
      'Total meetings: ',
      CAST(total_meetings AS STRING),
      '. ',
      team_1,
      ' wins: ',
      CAST(team_1_wins AS STRING),
      '. ',
      team_2,
      ' wins: ',
      CAST(team_2_wins AS STRING),
      '. ',
      'Draws: ',
      CAST(draws AS STRING),
      '.'
    )
  ) AS ai_rivalry_summary
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.match_prediction_dev.head_to_head_gold
WHERE
  total_meetings >= 4
ORDER BY
  total_meetings DESC
LIMIT 10

datasets.name: team_rankings
queryLines:
SELECT
  team,
  total_matches,
  win_rate,
  total_goals_scored
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.match_prediction_dev.team_performance_gold
WHERE
  total_matches >= 10
ORDER BY
  win_rate DESC
LIMIT 15

datasets.name: tournament_summary
queryLines:
SELECT
  tournament_name AS tournament,
  total_matches AS matches,
  ROUND(avg_goals_per_match, 2) AS avg_goals,
  penalty_shootouts AS penalties,
  ROUND(draw_rate, 1) AS draw_pct
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.match_prediction_dev.tournament_summary_gold
ORDER BY
  start_date DESC

datasets.name: ai_match_preview
queryLines:
SELECT
  home_team,
  away_team,
  stage_name,
  home_goals,
  away_goals,
  ai_query(
    'databricks-meta-llama-3-3-70b-instruct',
    CONCAT(
      'Generate a 2-sentence analytical preview for this 2022 FIFA World Cup match: ',
      home_team,
      ' vs ',
      away_team,
      ' (',
      stage_name,
      '). ',
      'Final score: ',
      CAST(home_goals AS STRING),
      '-',
      CAST(away_goals AS STRING),
      '. ',
      'Focus on what made this matchup significant or surprising.'
    )
  ) AS ai_match_preview
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.match_prediction_dev.matches_silver
WHERE
  tournament_name LIKE '2022%'
ORDER BY
  match_date
LIMIT 8

datasets.name: era_trends
queryLines:
SELECT
  era,
  avg_goals_per_match,
  total_matches,
  home_win_rate,
  close_match_rate
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.match_prediction_dev.era_trends_gold
ORDER BY
  era

datasets.name: upset_v2
queryLines:
SELECT
  gap_bucket AS matchup_type,
  COUNT(*) AS total_matches,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN is_upset = true THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS upsets,
  ROUND(
    100.0
      * SUM(
        CASE
          WHEN is_upset = true THEN 1
          ELSE 0
        END
      )
      / COUNT(*),
    1
  ) AS upset_rate_pct
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.match_prediction_dev.upset_probability_gold
GROUP BY
  gap_bucket
ORDER BY
  upset_rate_pct DESC

datasets.name: home_adv_v2
queryLines:
SELECT
  era,
  stage_name,
  ROUND(AVG(home_win_rate), 1) AS home_win_rate,
  SUM(total_matches) AS total_matches
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.match_prediction_dev.home_advantage_gold
WHERE
  total_matches >= 5
GROUP BY
  era,
  stage_name
ORDER BY
  era,
  stage_name

datasets.name: model_pred_v2
queryLines:
SELECT
  home_team,
  away_team,
  match_date,
  stage_name,
  CASE home_result
    WHEN 'W' THEN 'Home Win'
    WHEN 'D' THEN 'Draw'
    WHEN 'L' THEN 'Away Win'
  END AS actual_outcome,
  CASE
    ai_query(
      'match-outcome-predictor',
      request =>
        named_struct(
          'home_form_5_win_rate',
          home_form_5_win_rate,
          'home_form_10_win_rate',
          home_form_10_win_rate,
          'home_form_5_avg_goals',
          home_form_5_avg_goals,
          'home_days_rest',
          CAST(home_days_rest AS DOUBLE),
          'away_form_5_win_rate',
          away_form_5_win_rate,
          'away_form_10_win_rate',
          away_form_10_win_rate,
          'away_form_5_avg_goals',
          away_form_5_avg_goals,
          'away_days_rest',
          CAST(away_days_rest AS DOUBLE),
          'total_meetings',
          CAST(total_meetings AS DOUBLE),
          'h2h_team1_wins',
          CAST(h2h_team1_wins AS DOUBLE),
          'h2h_team2_wins',
          CAST(h2h_team2_wins AS DOUBLE)
        ),
      returnType => 'STRING'
    )
    WHEN '0' THEN 'Home Win'
    WHEN '1' THEN 'Draw'
    WHEN '2' THEN 'Away Win'
    WHEN 'home_win' THEN 'Home Win'
    WHEN 'draw' THEN 'Draw'
    WHEN 'away_win' THEN 'Away Win'
    ELSE 'Unknown'
  END AS predicted_outcome,
  CASE
    WHEN
      (
        home_result = 'W'
        AND ai_query(
          'match-outcome-predictor',
          request =>
            named_struct(
              'home_form_5_win_rate',
              home_form_5_win_rate,
              'home_form_10_win_rate',
              home_form_10_win_rate,
              'home_form_5_avg_goals',
              home_form_5_avg_goals,
              'home_days_rest',
              CAST(home_days_rest AS DOUBLE),
              'away_form_5_win_rate',
              away_form_5_win_rate,
              'away_form_10_win_rate',
              away_form_10_win_rate,
              'away_form_5_avg_goals',
              away_form_5_avg_goals,
              'away_days_rest',
              CAST(away_days_rest AS DOUBLE),
              'total_meetings',
              CAST(total_meetings AS DOUBLE),
              'h2h_team1_wins',
              CAST(h2h_team1_wins AS DOUBLE),
              'h2h_team2_wins',
              CAST(h2h_team2_wins AS DOUBLE)
            ),
          returnType => 'STRING'
        ) IN ('home_win', '0')
      )
      OR (
        home_result = 'D'
        AND ai_query(
          'match-outcome-predictor',
          request =>
            named_struct(
              'home_form_5_win_rate',
              home_form_5_win_rate,
              'home_form_10_win_rate',
              home_form_10_win_rate,
              'home_form_5_avg_goals',
              home_form_5_avg_goals,
              'home_days_rest',
              CAST(home_days_rest AS DOUBLE),
              'away_form_5_win_rate',
              away_form_5_win_rate,
              'away_form_10_win_rate',
              away_form_10_win_rate,
              'away_form_5_avg_goals',
              away_form_5_avg_goals,
              'away_days_rest',
              CAST(away_days_rest AS DOUBLE),
              'total_meetings',
              CAST(total_meetings AS DOUBLE),
              'h2h_team1_wins',
              CAST(h2h_team1_wins AS DOUBLE),
              'h2h_team2_wins',
              CAST(h2h_team2_wins AS DOUBLE)
            ),
          returnType => 'STRING'
        ) IN ('draw', '1')
      )
      OR (
        home_result = 'L'
        AND ai_query(
          'match-outcome-predictor',
          request =>
            named_struct(
              'home_form_5_win_rate',
              home_form_5_win_rate,
              'home_form_10_win_rate',
              home_form_10_win_rate,
              'home_form_5_avg_goals',
              home_form_5_avg_goals,
              'home_days_rest',
              CAST(home_days_rest AS DOUBLE),
              'away_form_5_win_rate',
              away_form_5_win_rate,
              'away_form_10_win_rate',
              away_form_10_win_rate,
              'away_form_5_avg_goals',
              away_form_5_avg_goals,
              'away_days_rest',
              CAST(away_days_rest AS DOUBLE),
              'total_meetings',
              CAST(total_meetings AS DOUBLE),
              'h2h_team1_wins',
              CAST(h2h_team1_wins AS DOUBLE),
              'h2h_team2_wins',
              CAST(h2h_team2_wins AS DOUBLE)
            ),
          returnType => 'STRING'
        ) IN ('away_win', '2')
      )
    THEN
      'Correct'
    ELSE 'Wrong'
  END AS verdict
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.match_prediction_dev.vw_match_prediction_features
ORDER BY
  match_date DESC
LIMIT 15

datasets.name: model_accuracy
queryLines:
WITH predictions AS (
  SELECT
    home_result AS actual,
    ai_query(
      'match-outcome-predictor',
      request =>
        named_struct(
          'home_form_5_win_rate',
          home_form_5_win_rate,
          'home_form_10_win_rate',
          home_form_10_win_rate,
          'home_form_5_avg_goals',
          home_form_5_avg_goals,
          'home_days_rest',
          CAST(home_days_rest AS DOUBLE),
          'away_form_5_win_rate',
          away_form_5_win_rate,
          'away_form_10_win_rate',
          away_form_10_win_rate,
          'away_form_5_avg_goals',
          away_form_5_avg_goals,
          'away_days_rest',
          CAST(away_days_rest AS DOUBLE),
          'total_meetings',
          CAST(total_meetings AS DOUBLE),
          'h2h_team1_wins',
          CAST(h2h_team1_wins AS DOUBLE),
          'h2h_team2_wins',
          CAST(h2h_team2_wins AS DOUBLE)
        ),
      returnType => 'STRING'
    ) AS predicted
  FROM
    fifa_worldcup.match_prediction_dev.vw_match_prediction_features
  WHERE
    match_date >= '2014-01-01'
)
SELECT
  COUNT(*) AS total_predictions,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN
        (
          actual = 'W'
          AND predicted IN ('home_win', '0')
        )
        OR (
          actual = 'D'
          AND predicted IN ('draw', '1')
        )
        OR (
          actual = 'L'
          AND predicted IN ('away_win', '2')
        )
      THEN
        1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS correct_predictions,
  ROUND(
    100.0
      * SUM(
        CASE
          WHEN
            (
              actual = 'W'
              AND predicted IN ('home_win', '0')
            )
            OR (
              actual = 'D'
              AND predicted IN ('draw', '1')
            )
            OR (
              actual = 'L'
              AND predicted IN ('away_win', '2')
            )
          THEN
            1
          ELSE 0
        END
      )
      / COUNT(*),
    1
  ) AS accuracy_pct
FROM
  predictions

datasets.name: kpi_summary
queryLines:
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT tournament_name) AS total_tournaments,
  COUNT(*) AS total_matches,
  COUNT(DISTINCT home_team) AS total_teams,
  ROUND(AVG(home_goals + away_goals), 2) AS avg_goals_per_match,
  MAX(match_date) AS latest_match
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.match_prediction_dev.matches_silver

datasets.name: stage_perf_v2
queryLines:
SELECT
  team,
  stage_category AS stage_name,
  matches_played AS total_matches,
  wins,
  draws,
  losses,
  ROUND(win_rate, 1) AS win_rate,
  goals_scored,
  goals_conceded
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.match_prediction_dev.stage_performance_gold
WHERE
  matches_played >= 3
ORDER BY
  win_rate DESC

datasets.name: knockout_v3
queryLines:
SELECT
  team,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN stage_category NOT LIKE '%group%' THEN wins
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS knockout_wins,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN stage_category NOT LIKE '%group%' THEN matches_played
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS knockout_matches,
  ROUND(
    100.0
      * SUM(
        CASE
          WHEN stage_category NOT LIKE '%group%' THEN wins
          ELSE 0
        END
      )
      / NULLIF(
        SUM(
          CASE
            WHEN stage_category NOT LIKE '%group%' THEN matches_played
            ELSE 0
          END
        ),
        0
      ),
    1
  ) AS knockout_win_rate,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN stage_category LIKE '%group%' THEN wins
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS group_wins,
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN stage_category LIKE '%group%' THEN matches_played
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) AS group_matches,
  ROUND(
    100.0
      * SUM(
        CASE
          WHEN stage_category LIKE '%group%' THEN wins
          ELSE 0
        END
      )
      / NULLIF(
        SUM(
          CASE
            WHEN stage_category LIKE '%group%' THEN matches_played
            ELSE 0
          END
        ),
        0
      ),
    1
  ) AS group_win_rate
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.match_prediction_dev.stage_performance_gold
GROUP BY
  team
HAVING
  SUM(
    CASE
      WHEN stage_category NOT LIKE '%group%' THEN matches_played
      ELSE 0
    END
  ) >= 5
ORDER BY
  knockout_win_rate DESC
LIMIT 12

datasets.name: outcome_distribution
queryLines:
SELECT
  CASE match_outcome
    WHEN 'home_win' THEN 'Home Win'
    WHEN 'draw' THEN 'Draw'
    WHEN 'away_win' THEN 'Away Win'
  END AS outcome,
  COUNT(*) AS matches,
  ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (), 1) AS pct
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.match_prediction_dev.matches_silver
GROUP BY
  match_outcome

datasets.name: home_adv_trend
queryLines:
SELECT
  era,
  ROUND(AVG(home_win_rate), 1) AS home_win_rate,
  ROUND(AVG(away_win_rate), 1) AS away_win_rate,
  ROUND(AVG(draw_rate), 1) AS draw_rate
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.match_prediction_dev.home_advantage_gold
WHERE
  total_matches >= 3
GROUP BY
  era
ORDER BY
  era

datasets.name: knockout_scatter
queryLines:
SELECT
  team,
  ROUND(goals_scored * 1.0 / matches_played, 2) AS goals_per_match,
  ROUND(goals_conceded * 1.0 / matches_played, 2) AS conceded_per_match,
  matches_played AS knockout_matches,
  ROUND(win_rate, 1) AS win_rate
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.match_prediction_dev.stage_performance_gold
WHERE
  stage_category NOT LIKE '%group%'
  AND matches_played >= 5
ORDER BY
  goals_per_match DESC

datasets.name: team_filter_options
queryLines:
SELECT DISTINCT
  team
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.match_prediction_dev.team_performance_gold
WHERE
  total_matches >= 5
ORDER BY
  team

datasets.name: era_filter_options
queryLines:
SELECT DISTINCT
  era
FROM
  fifa_worldcup.match_prediction_dev.era_trends_gold
ORDER BY
  era

frame.title: All-Time Team Win Rate Rankings
frame.description: Germany leads historically at 66%, followed by Brazil at 65%

frame.title: Live Model Predictions vs Actual Results
frame.description: Real-time predictions from the match-outcome-predictor endpoint against historical results.

frame.title: Live Prediction Accuracy
frame.description: XGBoost model scored against 291 post-2014 matches via live serving endpoint

frame.title: Correct Predictions
frame.description: Correct / Total predictions from the live endpoint

lines: ## FIFA World Cup Match Prediction Intelligence
AI-powered analysis of **1,248 matches** across **30 tournaments** (1930–2022). XGBoost model accuracy: **59.5%** — outperforming random baseline by 26 points.

frame.title: Matches Analyzed
frame.description: Training data for our prediction model

lines:
---
#### Live Model Performance
Every prediction calls the `match-outcome-predictor` endpoint in real-time using 11 features (team form, H2H, rest days).

frame.title: Match Outcome Distribution
frame.description: Home teams win 44% of matches — advantage is real but not decisive

frame.title: Scoring Trends Across Eras
frame.description: Goals per match peaked in the 1950s (5.38) and have stabilized around 2.5-2.8 since the 1990s

frame.title: Upset Rate by Strength Gap
frame.description: Close matches (0-5% gap) produce 4x more upsets than lopsided ones (30%+)

frame.title: Tournament Comparison
frame.description: All 30 FIFA World Cup editions ordered by most recent

lines: #### How Has the World Cup Evolved?
Scoring trends, upset patterns, and competitive balance across 9 decades.
AI-analyzed matchups and the declining home advantage effect across eras.

frame.title: Home Advantage Decline Over Decades
frame.description: Home win rate collapsed from 88% (1930s) to 47% (2020s). Away teams now win 22-35% of the time vs nearly 0% historically.

lines: #### Who Performs When It Matters Most?
Knockout-stage win rates vs group stage — teams that thrive under elimination pressure.

frame.title: Knockout vs Group Stage Win Rate
frame.description: Teams with 5+ knockout matches. Higher knockout performance = true tournament pedigree.

frame.title: Knockout Attack vs Defense Profile
frame.description: Bubble size = win rate. Top-left quadrant = elite (score heavily, concede little). Bottom-right = vulnerable (concede more than they score).
